title: Lane D Onboarding Config
description: A single config file that parameterizes every packaging-specific value for the guarded-autonomous benchmark-and-refine loop. Write this once and the scaffolder produces a complete Lane D loop host.

packaging_root.description: Default absolute path to the packaging root (overridable by CW_ROOT env).

system_name.description: Human-readable system name for prompts and journal messages (e.g. 'Barter Copywriter').

system_name_short.description: Short form used in technique-doc edit prompts (e.g. 'Barter Copywriter technique doc').

dimensions.description: Ordered dimension keys with per-dimension floor and max. Order is significant.

ship_threshold.description: Score threshold for auto-shipping (e.g. 19). Used by the convergence check.

self_score_regex.description: Regex to extract the self-reported score from raw benchmark output. Must capture the score as group 1.

frozen_name.description: Filename in _gates/ for the frozen snapshot.

live_relpath.description: Relative path from packaging root to the live doc.

section_anchor.description: Markdown heading that starts the section to freeze; null means freeze whole file.

anchors.description: Literal strings that must remain in the live scoring docs (cheap erosion tripwire).

manifest_note.description: Note written into _gates/MANIFEST.json. Defaults to 'Immutable {system_name} scoring surface.' if omitted.

technique_doc_map.description: Map from dimension key -> editable technique doc relpath (from packaging root). These are the ONLY docs the proposer may edit.

derived_copies.description: Verbatin-copy derivations (derive.py). Each entry maps a CLI source to one or more target copies.

src_relpath.description: Relative path from packaging root's knowledge base to the CLI source doc.

relpath.description: Relative path from packaging root to the target copy.

is_skill_ref.description: True = this target gets sk-doc frontmatter prepended.

skill_ref_basename.description: Key into skill_reference_frontmatter for this target's template frontmatter.

synthesized_surfaces.description: Relative paths (from packaging root) of docs that require LLM/human re-derivation on source change; flagged at derive time, not auto-regenerated.

skill_reference_frontmatter.description: Per-file frontmatter for skill reference copies. Key = basename, value = {title, description}.

visible.description: Visible optimization fixture IDs (env LOOP_FIXTURES default).

held_out.description: Held-out promotion-gate fixture IDs (env LOOP_HELD_OUT default).

variants.description: Benchmark variants to run (env LOOP_VARIANTS default).

grader.description: Default grader model (env GRADER_MODEL); must differ from proposer family.

proposer_family.description: Substring that identifies the proposer's model family; grader must NOT contain this.

benchmark_mode_instructions.description: Per-variant system prompt body for benchmark/run.sh. Key = variant name. May contain {{CW}} (replaced with $CW), {{CI_PATH}} (replaced with full CI load command), {{SKILL_DIR}} (replaced with $skill_dir).

benchmark_variant_preludes.description: Optional per-variant bash commands to execute BEFORE the SYS= assignment (e.g. CI variable loads). Key = variant name.

benchmark_combinator.description: String interpolated into the benchmark system prompt after variant instructions (output contract + task).

ci_compact_path.description: Relative path from packaging root to the compact Custom Instructions (for {{CI_COMPACT}} in instructions).

ci_full_path.description: Relative path from packaging root to the full Custom Instructions (for {{CI_FULL}} in instructions).

skill_dir_name.description: Directory name inside packaging root for the skill (for {{SKILL_DIR}} in instructions).

hard_blocker_words.description: AI-vocabulary words that the deterministic linter flags as hard blockers.

label.description: Human-readable label for the lint violation.

hard_blocker_patterns.description: Additional deterministic lint patterns beyond word matching.

soft_phrase_patterns.description: Phrase patterns flagged as soft (lower confidence) by the linter.

worktree_prefix.description: Prefix for loop-owned git worktrees (e.g. 'copywriter-loop-'). Defaults to a slug of system_name.

worktree_subdir.description: Subdirectory inside the repo containing the packaging (e.g. 'Copywriter').

packaging_root_env.description: Environment variable name for packaging root override. Defaults to 'CW_ROOT'.
